# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  build-and-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python version
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build and package application
        run: |
          # build command here

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        env:
          NPM_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          PYPI_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
          PYPI_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}
        run: |
          twine upload dist/*

      - name: Create GitHub release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          RELEASE_NAME: "Release v$GITHUB_REF"
          RELEASE_BODY: "Release notes for version $GITHUB_REF"

      - name: Publish to npm
        env:
          NPM_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          npm publish dist/*
